Meet the Practitioner

Wellness, treated as a clinical craft.

House of Kallos was founded by Danielle with a single belief: wellness deserves the same clinical rigour as any other discipline. Everyone should feel beautiful, healthy and confident both inside and out.

"I don't just practice aesthetics; I help people become
the best version of themselves."

Every protocol is evidence-led, every consultation unhurried,
and every aftercare follow-up genuinely personal.

Our Services

Treatments, tailored to you.

01 — Injectable

Dermal Fillers & Filler Dissolving

Hyaluronic acid-based fillers hydrate, plump and sculpt for a youthful glow — plus specialised dissolving to restore a natural look.

Learn More
02 — Injectable

Anti-Wrinkle

Preventative injectables to soften lines and refresh.

Learn More
03 — Skin

Skin Rejuvenation

A curated menu of advanced facials — exosomes, Sculptra, Radiesse, microneedling and pink glow treatments — tailored to your skin goals.

Learn More
04 — Skin

Biorevitalisation

Tiny injections of hyaluronic acid, vitamins & amino acids to deeply hydrate the skin.

Learn More
05 — IV Therapy

Hydration & Energy Boost IV Drip

Vitamins, minerals & hydration straight to the bloodstream.

Learn More
06 — Contouring

Fat Dissolving

Targeted injections to break down stubborn fat.

Learn More
07 — IV Therapy

Skin Brightening & NAD+ IV Drips

Glutathione and vitamin C for radiance, paired with NAD+ for cellular renewal and anti-ageing.

Learn More
08 — Injectable

Vitamin Injections

Quick intramuscular boosters — B12, vitamin D and biotin — for energy, immunity and glow.

Learn More
09 — Regenerative

PRP & Vampire Treatments

Platelet-rich plasma therapy that harnesses your own blood to rejuvenate skin, restore hair growth and enhance natural lift.

Learn More
How It Works

From booking to bliss in four simple steps.

Every session is structured to be unhurried, safe, and personally tailored. No two bodies are the same — your treatment shouldn't be either.

1

Consultation

Upon booking, a 15-minute call to understand your goals, lifestyle, and any health considerations.

2

Vitals & assessment

On arrival we take a quick vitals check and review your medical history together.

3

Your bespoke treatment

Settle in with a hot drink. Most sessions take 30–60 minutes — bring a book or a podcast.

4

Aftercare & follow-up

Detailed aftercare notes, recovery guidance, and a follow-up message within 48 hours.

Book Now
